---
title: "Fall 2026 Schedule"
---

| Date    | Speaker                       | Affiliation | Title | Website |
|---------|-------------------------------|-------------|-------|---------|
| Aug 27  | NRE community                 |             |       |         |
| Sept 3  |                               |             |       |         |
| Sept 10 |                               |             |       |         |
| Sept 17 |                               |             |       |         |
| Sept 24 |                               |             |       |         |
| Oct 1   |                               |             |       |         |
| Oct 8   |                               |             |       |         |
| Oct 15  |                               |             |       |         |
| Oct 22  |                               |             |       |         |
| Oct 29  |                               |             |       |         |
| Nov 5   |                               |             |       |         |
| Nov 12  |                               |             |       |         |
| Nov 19  |                               |             |       |         |
| Nov 26  | No seminar. Happy fall break! |             |       |         |
| Dec 3   |                               |             |       |         |
